comments.body: looks like a potential htpasswd issue in the tests?  Did we not change the registry version in the test suites here?
Changes LGTM, I don't think the test issues are specific to them.

> looks like a potential htpasswd issue in the tests? Did we not change the registry version in the test suites here?

Apparently not. Let’s fix this now, while it is cheap, and not get into the habit of ignoring test suite failures, or it will snowball and we will have no practical tests for an urgent fix.

(To avoid duplicate work, I’ll do that now.)

> (To avoid duplicate work, I’ll do that now.)

#983

> and not get into the habit of ignoring test suite failures

I completely agree. These branches must have a working CI.
